text: Found three key files controlling service account token auto-mounting: (1) `plugin/pkg/admission/serviceaccount/admission.go` — the admission controller that injects service account tokens into pods, checking `AutomountServiceAccountToken` on both the pod spec and the ServiceAccount object to decide whether to mount a token volume; (2) `pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go` — contains `ValidatePodSpec` which validates pod specs including the `ServiceAccountName` field (the `AutomountServiceAccountToken` field is a `*bool` requiring no special validation beyond type checking, but the service account name is validated here); (3) `pkg/controller/serviceaccount/tokens_controller.go` — the `TokensController` that watches ServiceAccount and Secret objects and creates/manages ServiceAccountToken secrets for service accounts.
